feedback.text: The Digital Fairness Act needs to consider and work to solve the problems of digital purchases and ownership brought to light by the SKG (Stop Killing Games) initiative. It is important for the EU to be the driving force towards broadened consumer protections for video games and the protection of the art form as a whole. Companies won't self-regulate on this issue since it's in their monetary interest to kill games and take away consumers access to their purchases, so that they'll buy new games rather than enjoying the ones they already have.
